title: Calgary (Alberta) - Canada.ca
content:
The City of Calgary is proud of its vibrant, multicultural Francophone community. It offers an urban lifestyle less than an hour from the Rockies. Many of Calgary’s early pioneers were Francophone, and those origins can still be seen today.
